hypotheses.name: Multi-predictor joint model (STRING + Dorothea + GO CC + GO BP)
hypotheses.method: For 21,736 named-gene pairs, build feature matrix [STRING_score, Dorothea_conf, GO_BP_jaccard, GO_CC_jaccard]. Compute partial Spearman R^2 at each of 12 layers via rank-regression residualization. VIF computed at L8 from rank-correlation matrix inversion. STRING from iter_0015 cache (3092 pairs), Dorothea from dorothea_human.tsv (1137 pairs, confidence A-E→5-1), GO from mygene API.
hypotheses.result_value: 0.01695 (3/4 predictors sig: STRING partial R^2=0.00962, Dorothea=0.00205, GO_CC=0.00519; VIF all <2)
hypotheses.next_action: Replicate joint model on Geneformer embeddings to validate cross-model consistency

hypotheses.name: Layer-resolved encoding timeline across 5 biological anchors
hypotheses.method: Compile existing per-layer Spearman/AUROC curves from iter_0022 (STRING), iter_0023 (TRRUST activation), iter_0024 (Dorothea, GO CC, GO BP). Find peak layer per anchor. Compute pairwise Spearman between 12-point curves. Classify each anchor as early/mid/late encoding by epoch mean.
hypotheses.result_value: 7 layers span (L0-L7), 3 unique peak layers; GO_CC peaks L5 (mid), GO_BP peaks L7 (late), Dorothea peaks L7 (mid-late); inter-anchor mean rho=0.250
hypotheses.next_action: Test if GO_CC early advantage (L0-L4 > L8-L11 controlling for GO_BP) is statistically significant — partial timeline decomposition

hypotheses.name: Chromosomal proximity negative control
hypotheses.method: Fetch chromosomal locations for 209 named genes via mygene API (genomic_pos.chr). Classify 21,736 pairs as same-chromosome (n=1212) vs different-chromosome (n=20524). Mann-Whitney AUROC at each layer: does cross-chromosome distance exceed same-chromosome distance? Expected null if signals are functional not genomic.
hypotheses.result_value: 0.5150 (vs null 0.5; effect size ~0.01-0.03; weakens to non-significant at L11 p=0.096)
hypotheses.next_action: This is the expected null result — confirms functional specificity of STRING/GO/Dorothea signals. No follow-up needed.
